# GitHub Copilot Instructions — udm-common

Read `AGENTS.md` at the repo root for full project context before answering any questions about this repository.

For external UDS/Defense Unicorns documentation, fetch: https://docs.defenseunicorns.com/llms.txt

## ISV CI Setup

When a user asks to set up CI, configure their pipeline, or wire up UDM for their project, read and follow `.claude/skills/isv-setup/RUNBOOK.md` phase by phase. Do not summarize or skip phases.
